title: Erdős–Gyárfás Conjecture
next_action: Strategy-audit the expanded post-L034 portfolio (all threads live per the standing user instruction; see STATE.md Threads A-F). Proposed first moves, both cheap and decisive: (i) the odd-S calibration scan — all-band all-terminal-pair taut scan of the E010 stream at orders <=15 with 'every through-path odd' in place of the ratio ceiling (abort on the first even through-path; the banded E013 scanners cannot see S={3,7}-type gadgets) — which either exhibits all-odd taut cores (the parity analogue of the five equality blocks, reshaping the program) or shows the parity channel is shape-empty like the pinched one; and (ii) the G014 source audits (Chen-Saito; the bipartite >=32 bound that gates the Mersenne-window logic; bipartite-EGC-verified-to-31; Heckman-Krakovski; Shauger/Daniel-Shauger; census provenance; Markstrom's generator method), which gate the bipartite gadget hunt (orders 16-24, genbg, terminals in opposite parts, girth >=6, no C8/C16), census mining, and the cubic order-30 census legs. Co-primary on the pinched channel: the pencil endgame (L033 frame, fan case first, A015 cascade pressure points; a pencil-type band-4 taut core at order >=16 kills it and is disproof material). Deferred alternatives held live: band-2 closed rung warm-up; 1-atom structure theory; band-5 equality analogue; order-17 legs; the dedicated {C4,C8}-free generator build. NOTE: the E013 order-16 closed scan is still running in a background process from S015; its harvest (C032 addendum, E013 README, any block/dissection updates) is reserved for a short dedicated follow-up session by the S015 agent and needs no action in this session.
